calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-30-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2002 Dismissal - No Appearance

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2002 Set For Trial On Aug-19-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-30-02 At 04:15 P.M. In Dept 210

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Dec-12-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Wayne Lewis Lesser, Esq. 563-2111 for pltf & opposing party; Howard S. Caro, Esq. & Robert B. Hawk, Esq. 650/324-7000 for deft & moving party.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer overruled. Complaint alleges that sales tax is being separately charged on shipping charges. Accordingly plaintiff states causes of action for unfair business practice violation and false advertising because sales tax may not be charged on separately itemized shipping costs. Accordingly issues not appropriate for decision on demurrer.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Pltf to prepare order.
